items.title: Apple tightens App Review Guidelines against apps that 'do not add value to the App Store'
items.summary: Apple has updated its App Store Review Guidelines with new language targeting apps that it says "do not add value to the App Store." Here are the details.

items.title: Hands on with AirPods EQ settings in iOS 27

items.title: Report: iPhone production grew 20% in Q1, countering global smartphone dip
items.summary: A new TrendForce report shows Apple's iPhone production growing sharply in Q1, even as rising memory costs put pressure on the broader smartphone market. Here are the details.

items.title: NVIDIA Confidential Computing to Help Expand Apple's Private Cloud Compute
items.summary: NVIDIA GPUs with Confidential Computing are now used for confidential inference in Apple's Private Cloud Compute (PCC), as it expands beyond Apple's data centers to Google Cloud. Unveiled during Apple's annual WWDC gathering for developers...

items.title: GM becomes first automaker to partner with Redwood across full battery lifecycle
items.summary: General Motors has expanded its partnership with Redwood Materials to cover every stage of the battery lifecycle - manufacturing scrap recovery, end-of-life recycling, and now second-life energy storage deployed at a GM factory. It's the...

items.title: Claude Fable 5 brings Mythos to the masses - Anthropic's new frontier model is 'state-of-the-art on nearly all tested benchmarks'
items.summary: After first announcing its scarily capable Mythos Preview model back in April, Anthropic is releasing a public version of Mythos, called Fable 5, that it says is "safe for general use."
